resposta:
solution: 
```
class Solution:
    def digitCount(self, num: str) -> bool:
        for i in range(len(num)):
            if int(num[i]) != str(i).count(str(i)):
                return False
        return True
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution iterates through the input string, for each digit, it checks if the count of the digit in the string matches the index of the digit. If any mismatch is found, it returns False. If no mismatch is found after iterating through the entire string, it returns True. The time complexity is O(n) as it needs to iterate through the entire string, and the space complexity is O(1) as it only uses a constant amount of space.
